assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking for deprecated API removal and beta APIs that were removed in K8s 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check validating/mutating webhook configurations and events for AdmissionWebhookEvaluationFailed

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking control plane resource usage increases in 1.32 and includes commands to check allocated resources on nodes

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check kube-system pods status and events, and mentions checking for stuck controllers

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple kubectl get --raw /metrics commands for checking API server request latency, error rates, and other metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response mentions CNI/networking changes and network policy enforcement changes, plus commands to check pod networking health

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check events in multiple namespaces and mentions checking for NetworkNotReady events

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes command to check HPA status across all namespaces and mentions verifying horizontal pod autoscaling is working
